The '''Rellias Straits''' were a channel that connected [[Rellias]] with other underwater [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] cities and [[Otoh Gunga/Legends|Otoh Gunga]].

==History==
During the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]], [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]] [[Siege of Otoh Gunga|attacked]] Rellias and forced [[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Ganne]] to lead him to the Rellias Straits and the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] [[Droid/Legends|Droid]] Army prepared to attack the underwater [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] cities with their waterproof [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]].

They were diverted, however, when they received news of another rebellion breaking out in the swamps (which was in fact Queen [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and her personal guards making their way to the [[Theed Royal Palace/Legends|Theed Royal Palace]]).
